title: CDSCO Flags 46 Drug Batches Including Thyroxine, Amoxycillin-Clavulanate as NSQ in May 2026
summary: New Delhi: Continuing its nationwide post-market surveillance and quality monitoring drive, the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) has flagged 46 batches of drugs, medical devices,...
thbAction: Use the article as an entry point to pitch THB's commercial visibility layer for territory planning, account prioritization, and next-best-action for pharma leadership teams.
